# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
  - name: storageaccount
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: 2021-04-01
    location: 'West US'
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2
    properties:
      accessTier: Hot
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      supportModel:
        name: StandardMap
    dependsOn: []
    tags: {}
  - name: staticwebsitecontainer
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
    apiVersion: 2021-04-01
    location: 'West US'
    properties:
      accessTier: Hot
      publicAccess: Blob
    dependsOn:
      - storageaccount
  - name: indexhtmlcontainer
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
    apiVersion: 2021-04-01
    location: 'West US'
    properties:
      accessTier: Hot
      publicAccess: Blob
    dependsOn:
      - storageaccount
  - name: blobServiceProperties
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices
    apiVersion: 2021-04-01
    location: 'West US'
    properties:
      changeFeedEnabled: false
      hourlyTariffEnabled: true
      largeFileSharingEnabled: true
      lastAccessTimePropertyVersion: '*'
      publicAccess: Blob
      versioning: {
        enabled: true
        requireImmutabilityPeriodForDelete: false
        requireLastWritesToBeRetainedForDays: 0
      }
    dependsOn:
      - storageaccount
